dailyOutages.plant: Rangpur 132/33kV T-1 and T-2 transformers 33kV sides
dailyOutages.reason: due to 33kV Kawnia(PBS) feeder fault. Then, 132/33kV T-1 transformer was switched on at 12:05 hrs. Restoration of 132/33kV T-2 transformer is delayed due to 33kV bus coupler PT problem. Now, about 55MW interruption is occurring due to this.
dailyOutages.full_desc: Rangpur 132/33kV T-1 and T-2 transformers 33kV sides tripped showing O/C and E/F relay due to 33kV Kawnia(PBS) feeder fault. Then, 132/33kV T-1 transformer was switched on at 12:05 hrs. Restoration of 132/33kV T-2 transformer is delayed due to 33kV bus coupler PT problem. Now, about 55MW interruption is occurring due to this.
